text.title: Golden Set Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a golden-set artifact. Both per-item and dataset-level contracts apply.

forbidden.pattern: items array with item_count > 200 (signal: synthetic bloat; quality should improve, not size)
any item missing anti_output array OR anti_output.length == 0
item added without dataset_version bump in the same PR
audit_log entries with retired_items count == 0 over two consecutive quarters (signal: skipped audit)
expected_output containing the dataset's golden-set version string OR known seed-trigger tokens (indicates leakage)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Promote a candidate from "incident_followup" to a golden item after reviewer sign-off and bucket assignment.
Auto-redact PII fields in input while preserving the structural shape (replace email → "EMAIL_REDACTED").
Sub-bucket items within a parent bucket (e.g., known_failure_class.tax_id_format) for finer drift tracking; sub-buckets do not count for r1 distribution.

list.item: Every item has anti_output array, length ≥ 1
dataset_version is bumped in any PR adding/removing items
Reviewer ≠ author for each new item
Quarterly audit_log has at least one retire OR schema_changed in 90 days OR explicit "no changes verified" entry
